scripts.test: bash ../git-mesh/scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh-core/build" cargo test --locked
scripts.lint: bash ../git-mesh/scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh-core/check" cargo clippy --quiet --locked -- -D warnings
scripts.typecheck: bash ../git-mesh/scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh-core/check" cargo check --quiet --locked
